> Summarize the key changes and any important context reviewers should know.

---

## 📊 Type of Change

* [ ] 📖 `docs` — Documentation update
* [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature
* [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
* [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code refactoring
* [ ] 🎨 `style` — Code style, formatting, or linting changes
* [ ] ✅ `test` — Test additions or updates
* [ ] 🔧 `chore` — Maintenance, tooling, or dependency updates
* [ ] 🚑 `hotfix` — Urgent production fix

---

## 🌿 Branch Checklist

* [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`<type>/<short-description>`, e.g. `feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`, `refactor/*`)
* [ ] Branch created from `<source-branch>`
* [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format

---

## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

* [ ] Scope and requirements are clearly reflected in this PR
* [ ] Relevant tests/checks have passed
* [ ] Documentation has been updated where needed
* [ ] Ready for merge into `<target-branch>`

---

## 🚀 Impact

> Describe expected impact (feature behavior, performance, security, developer workflow, or user experience).

> Note whether this is backward-compatible and any rollout considerations.

---

## 📌 Notes

> Add reviewer notes, risks, follow-ups, linked issues, screenshots, or migration details.
